title: [InstCombine] Fold `(X & C1) - (X & C2) --> X & (C1 ^ C2)` if `(C1 & C2) == C2`

tests.outside_scope_reason: Uses i64 integer type instead of i8/i32 shown in examples, with large 64-bit constants (all-ones and 0xFF) demonstrating the pattern works across different integer widths not explicitly covered in the summary

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define i64 @i64_large_constants(i64 %a) {
#0:
  %and1 = and i64 %a, -1
  %and2 = and i64 %a, 255
  %ret = sub i64 %and1, %and2
  ret i64 %ret
}
=>
define i64 @i64_large_constants(i64 %a) {
#0:
  %ret = and i64 %a, -256
  ret i64 %ret
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

Summary:
  1 correct transformations
  0 incorrect transformations
  0 failed-to-prove transformations
  0 Alive2 errors

tests.outside_scope_reason: Tests the edge case where C2 = 0 (zero is a subset of any constant), which is mathematically valid but not demonstrated in any of the known test examples that all use non-zero constants

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define i32 @zero_mask_edge_case(i32 %a) {
#0:
  %and1 = and i32 %a, 255
  %and2 = and i32 %a, 0
  %ret = sub i32 %and1, %and2
  ret i32 %ret
}
=>
define i32 @zero_mask_edge_case(i32 %a) {
#0:
  %and1 = and i32 %a, 255
  ret i32 %and1
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

Summary:
  1 correct transformations
  0 incorrect transformations
  0 failed-to-prove transformations
  0 Alive2 errors

tests.outside_scope_reason: Tests when C1 == C2 (identical masks), resulting in X & 0 = 0, an edge case where the XOR produces zero - not covered in examples which all use different constants

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define i16 @identical_masks_cancel(i16 %a) {
#0:
  %and1 = and i16 %a, 4095
  %and2 = and i16 %a, 4095
  %ret = sub i16 %and1, %and2
  ret i16 %ret
}
=>
define i16 @identical_masks_cancel(i16 %a) {
#0:
  ret i16 0
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

Summary:
  1 correct transformations
  0 incorrect transformations
  0 failed-to-prove transformations
  0 Alive2 errors
